current_work_in_progress: Cycle 1 complete: compact mobile navigation and full route discovery are live with responsive evidence.
next_highest_value_action: Verify the compact admin and customer headers, Phantom chat composer, keyboard focus, and role-specific drawer contents on both live hosts; fix only evidence-backed overflow or authority problems.
known_risks: Multiple agents push directly to main; fetch and rebase before every push.
Admin and customer hosts serve one bundle but must expose different authority and navigation.
Authenticated live-host keyboard and reduced-motion journeys still need broader evidence beyond the local responsive matrix.
User-facing app changes require a full cache build-id bump and served-checkout sync.
